event_description: I have no specific knowledge from my training data of Weis Markets, Inc. (WMK) having announced an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance determination, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure tied to financial-reporting issues. Weis Markets is a regional supermarket chain based in Sunbury, Pennsylvania, and I do not recall any notable accounting controversies or SEC enforcement actions associated with the company. This absence of recall does not definitively confirm no such event occurred, but I have no reliable information indicating one did.
